Confirm that Finance Committee owns financial software, controls, reimbursement, spending authority, card/payment policy, monthly review, and audit/review process.
Review the Treasurer vs. Bookkeeper duty split and provide direction to Personnel Committee.
Approve software requirements before scheduling demos.
Set draft reimbursement and spending authority thresholds.
Decide whether shared debit cards should be replaced.
Define monthly review packet and meeting rhythm.
Identify budget impact for bookkeeping support, software, and outside payroll/accounting support.
Provide written direction to Personnel Committee before the Bookkeeper role is posted, interviews begin, or an offer is made.
Decide which items require Deacon review, church vote, CPA/accounting review, or bylaw review.

Needs Finance Review: This packet is a working draft for Finance Committee discussion. It should not be treated as final policy, budget approval, software selection, or church authorization.

End of chapter: Finance Committee Packet.
